verses.1: “These things I have spoken to you so that you will not be led into sin.
verses.2: They will ban you from the synagogue, yet an hour is coming for everyone who kills you to think that he is offering a service to God.
verses.3: These things they will do because they have not known the Father nor Me.
verses.4: But these things I have spoken to you, so that when their hour comes, you may remember that I told you of them. However, I did not say these things to you at the beginning, because I was with you.
verses.5: “But now I am going to Him who sent Me; and none of you asks Me, ‘Where are You going?’
verses.6: But because I have said these things to you, grief has filled your heart.
verses.7: But I tell you the truth: it is to your advantage that I am leaving; for if I do not leave, the Helper will not come to you; but if I go, I will send Him to you.
verses.8: And He, when He comes, will convict the world regarding sin, and righteousness, and judgment:
verses.9: regarding sin, because they do not believe in Me;
verses.10: and regarding righteousness, because I am going to the Father and you no longer are going to see Me;
verses.11: and regarding judgment, because the ruler of this world has been judged.
verses.12: “I have many more things to say to you, but you cannot bear them at the present time.
verses.13: But when He, the Spirit of truth, comes, He will guide you into all the truth; for He will not speak on His own, but whatever He hears, He will speak; and He will disclose to you what is to come.
verses.14: He will glorify Me, for He will take from Mine and will disclose it to you.
verses.15: All things that the Father has are Mine; this is why I said that He takes from Mine and will disclose it to you.
verses.16: “A little while, and you no longer are going to see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me.”
verses.17: So some of His disciples said to one another, “What is this that He is telling us, ‘A little while, and you are not going to see Me; and again a little while, and you will see Me’; and, ‘because I am going to the Father’?”
verses.18: So they were saying, “What is this that He says, ‘A little while’? We do not know what He is talking about. ”
verses.19: Jesus knew that they wanted to question Him, and He said to them, “Are you deliberating together about this, that I said, ‘A little while, and you are not going to see Me, and again a little while, and you will see Me’?
verses.20: Truly, truly I say to you that you will weep and mourn, but the world will rejoice; you will grieve, but your grief will be turned into joy!
verses.21: Whenever a woman is in labor she has pain, because her hour has come; but when she gives birth to the child, she no longer remembers the anguish because of the joy that a child has been born into the world.
verses.22: Therefore you too have grief now; but I will see you again, and your heart will rejoice, and no one is going to take your joy away from you.
verses.23: And on that day you will not question Me about anything. Truly, truly I say to you, if you ask the Father for anything in My name, He will give it to you.
verses.24: Until now you have asked for nothing in My name; ask and you will receive, so that your joy may be made full.
verses.25: “These things I have spoken to you in figures of speech; an hour is coming when I will no longer speak to you in figures of speech, but will tell you plainly about the Father.
verses.26: On that day you will ask in My name, and I am not saying to you that I will request of the Father on your behalf;
verses.27: for the Father Himself loves you, because you have loved Me and have believed that I came forth from the Father.
verses.28: I came forth from the Father and have come into the world; again, I am leaving the world and going to the Father.”
verses.29: His disciples said, “See, now You are speaking plainly and are not using any figure of speech.
verses.30: Now we know that You know all things, and that You have no need for anyone to question You; this is why we believe that You came forth from God.”
verses.31: Jesus replied to them, “Do you now believe?
verses.32: Behold, an hour is coming, and has already come, for you to be scattered, each to his own home, and to leave Me alone; and yet I am not alone, because the Father is with Me.
verses.33: These things I have spoken to you so that in Me you may have peace. In the world you have tribulation, but take courage; I have overcome the world.”
